keywordPlan.prompt:
You are selecting YouTube search keywords for a daily intelligence briefing.
Topic: What are the most talked about movies on social media?
Use this context and output strict JSON only.

Paper titles: ["Understanding LoRA as Knowledge Memory: An Empirical Analysis", "Beyond Language Modeling: An Exploration of Multimodal Pretraining", "Speculative Speculative Decoding", "Utonia: Toward One Encoder for All Point Clouds", "Chain of World: World Model Thinking in Latent Motion", "Agentic Code Reasoning", "CUDA Agent: Large-Scale Agentic RL for High-Performance CUDA Kernel Generation", "Helios: Real Real-Time Long Video Generation Model"]
Tweet snippets: []
Signal accounts: []

Return JSON with exactly this schema and nothing else:
{"keywords":["k1","k2","k3","k4"],"rationale":"one short sentence"}
Rules: keywords must be concise (2-6 words), specific, and relevant to likely new videos in last 24h.

status.output: {\"keywords\":[\"2025 Oscar winners highlights\",\"Wicked movie social media reaction\",\"Moana 2 streaming release buzz\",\"Anora movie awards discussion\"],\"rationale\":\"Keywords focus on the immediate aftermath of the 2025 Oscars and major March streaming releases trending on social platforms.\"}
